name: Production Site A
description: A sprawling manufacturing complex dedicated to producing high-performance automotive tires. It encompasses raw material handling, mixing, component preparation, tire building, curing, and final inspection stages, operating 24/7 with advanced automation systems. Its integrated logistics ensure efficient material flow and product distribution.
full_text: Production Site A - A sprawling manufacturing complex dedicated to producing high-performance automotive tires. It encompasses raw material handling, mixing, component preparation, tire building, curing, and final inspection stages, operating 24/7 with advanced automation systems. Its integrated logistics ensure efficient material flow and product distribution.

name: Curing Press 2
description: This advanced vulcanization press transforms green tires into finished products. It uses precise heat and pressure cycles to achieve optimal tire properties and durability.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Tire Production Line 2/Curing Press 2
full_text: Curing Press 2 - This advanced vulcanization press transforms green tires into finished products. It uses precise heat and pressure cycles to achieve optimal tire properties and durability.

name: Boiler System 1
description: Provides high-pressure steam for the entire factory's curing processes and various heating needs. Crucial for maintaining consistent temperatures and pressures throughout production.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Boiler System 1
full_text: Boiler System 1 - Provides high-pressure steam for the entire factory's curing processes and various heating needs. Crucial for maintaining consistent temperatures and pressures throughout production.

name: VMI MAXX 2
description: Cutting-edge machine for high-speed tire assembly.
full_text: VMI MAXX 2 - Cutting-edge machine for high-speed tire assembly.

name: Mixer 1
description: Blends rubber compounds with additives precisely.
path: Smart Tire Production/Production Site A/Mixing Department/Mixer 1
full_text: Mixer 1 - Blends rubber compounds with additives precisely.

name: AGV 3
description: Autonomous Guided Vehicle for material transport.
full_text: AGV 3 - Autonomous Guided Vehicle for material transport.
